classification_rule: Pipeline.predict using the fitted SVC decision boundary
repository_scope: This repository includes the fitted SVM model and integrity metadata, but not the complete training dataset or the script used to fit and serialize this final model.
operating_point_note: Prediction uses Pipeline.predict with the fitted SVC decision boundary. Cross-validation metrics generated by scripts/train_classifier.py use fold-specific Youden thresholds selected from each outer training fold, so they represent a different operating point.
probability_note: For scikit-learn SVC models, predict_proba uses probability calibration and may not cross 0.5 consistently with the predict() decision boundary.
